direction_note: harness compatibility alias; scientific contrast is two-sided signed (vP - vU) with preregistered labels where_dominant / how_dominant / balanced_or_inconclusive
interaction_positive_claim_requires: observed mean I exceeds p95 of additive-reconstruction null with measured no-op noise
selection_rule: fixed-priority C0 -> C1 -> C2 -> C3 after hard validity guards; effect size, sign, significance, and p-values are excluded from selection
confirmation_rule: confirm the selected candidate once on hidden_confirmation without reselection; a dev-supported directional claim requires same sign and absolute effect >= 0.01 on the confirmation split
